cards.label: 스튜디오 히어로
cards.scene: a single business card resting at a 45-degree tilt on a dark premium surface, one dramatic side light grazing the surface to reveal finish and edge thickness, macro detail

cards.label: 실사용(손)
cards.scene: a person elegantly handing over the business card, soft natural window light, warm modern office bokeh in the background, lifestyle moment

cards.label: 스타일링 플랫레이
cards.scene: top-down flat lay of a stack and fanned spread of the cards styled with a fountain pen, a coffee cup and a small plant on a textured neutral desk, editorial composition

cards.label: 마감 디테일 매크로
cards.scene: extreme macro close-up of the card edge and surface finish, showing paper fiber, foil specular highlight or impression depth, shallow depth of field

stickers.label: 스튜디오 히어로
stickers.scene: a cluster of die-cut stickers peeling slightly off a backing sheet on a clean colorful pastel surface, bright cheerful studio light

stickers.label: 실사용(적용)
stickers.scene: the sticker applied on a matte laptop lid and on a stainless water bottle, real lifestyle setting, bright daylight

stickers.label: 스타일링 플랫레이
stickers.scene: top-down flat lay of an assortment of stickers in varied organic shapes scattered playfully on a bright solid-color background, vibrant and saturated

stickers.label: 마감 디테일 매크로
stickers.scene: extreme macro of the sticker edge and finish — vinyl gloss, holographic shimmer or kraft texture — peeling corner detail, shallow depth of field

marketing.label: 스튜디오 히어로
marketing.scene: the printed marketing piece (flyer/brochure/postcard) propped upright and slightly fanned on a minimal modern surface, soft directional studio light

marketing.label: 실사용(손/매장)
marketing.scene: hands holding and browsing the open brochure or flyer in a bright cafe or retail setting, warm lifestyle bokeh

marketing.label: 스타일링 플랫레이
marketing.scene: top-down flat lay of the marketing print styled with a coffee cup, glasses and a notebook on a warm wooden desk, editorial lifestyle composition

marketing.label: 마감 디테일 매크로
marketing.scene: macro close-up of the paper edge, fold crease and coated print surface showing color saturation and stock thickness, shallow depth of field

office.label: 스튜디오 히어로
office.scene: the office stationery item (envelope/notebook/form) arranged cleanly on a minimal desk, soft daylight, professional and tidy

office.label: 실사용(데스크)
office.scene: the stationery in natural use on a working desk — an envelope being sealed or a notebook open with a pen resting on it, warm window light

office.label: 스타일링 플랫레이
office.scene: top-down flat lay of the stationery styled with a pen, paper clips and a small plant on a clean neutral desk, organized editorial composition

office.label: 마감 디테일 매크로
office.scene: macro close-up of the paper texture, fold or binding detail and clean edges, shallow depth of field, true-to-life stock

signs.label: 스튜디오 히어로
signs.scene: the banner or display standing upright in a clean bright environment, slight angle, professional studio-lit product shot

signs.label: 실사용(현장)
signs.scene: the roll-up banner or poster displayed at a real storefront, trade-show booth or event entrance, people softly blurred in the background, bright daylight

signs.label: 레이아웃 컷
signs.scene: a poster or banner laid flat and partially rolled on a wide minimal surface showing scale and vivid large-format color, soft even light

signs.label: 마감 디테일 매크로
signs.scene: macro close-up of the large-format print surface and material edge (vinyl/synthetic paper/foam), showing print sharpness and material texture

packaging.label: 스튜디오 히어로
packaging.scene: the box or shopping bag standing assembled on a clean studio surface, soft directional light revealing structure and material, premium product shot

packaging.label: 실사용(언박싱)
packaging.scene: the gift box being opened or the shopping bag carried by a person, warm lifestyle retail setting, soft daylight bokeh

packaging.label: 스타일링 플랫레이
packaging.scene: top-down flat lay of the packaging styled with tissue paper, ribbon and a small product peeking out, warm editorial composition

packaging.label: 마감 디테일 매크로
packaging.scene: macro close-up of the packaging material, fold/handle construction and surface finish (kraft texture, matte lamination or foil), shallow depth of field
